title: Government warning completely missing (flash-glare, level 7, tilt-right)
image_prompt: Photorealistic clear glass bottle with a minimalist black and white label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Ghost Pine', 'Gin', '45% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Distilled and bottled by Ghost Pine Spirits, Savannah, GA'. (Note: strictly DO NOT include any government warning text).
visualObservation: Visual note: label photo has moderate flash glare over label text. Camera orientation is tilt-right (15 degrees).
